title: ANC - UI
scenario: Verify that when ANC/Adaptive is set to ON, the Transparency/Environment section is disabled and greyed out.
steps: 2. Observe the default state of the ANC/Adaptive toggle.
4. Check the available options under the ANC section.
5. Check the available options under the Transparency section.
expected: ANC/Adaptive is set to ON by default. Transparency/Environment is set to OFF and all its values are disabled/greyed out. The ANC section displays "Adaptive" with description "Automatically adjusts to provide the best ANC experience." and "Standard" with description "Provide a more natural audio experience and enhanced sidetone comfort." The Transparency section displays "Environment" with description "Optimized to hear your surroundings." and "Speech" with description "Best for face-to-face communication."
